svg.title: Dot plot of 30 interventions ranked by cost per WELLBY. LMIC interventions dominate the cheapest end, led by Pure Earth Ghana ($9), Taimaka ($15), Friendship Bench ($21), and StrongMinds ($25). HIC interventions cluster at the expensive end, with Football Beyond Borders at $8,691 per WELLBY and Guide Dogs UK costing over $40,767.
